name: Bloodseeker
description: You should be honored to bleed so that the Flayed Ones may live.

15.right: -0.7% Bloodrage Max Health Damage per Second

abilities.name: Sanguivore
abilities.description: The seeker applies a lifesteal-based heal on itself corresponding to the max health of the killed unit. Denying allied heroes heal for the same amount. The self-heal is even less effective when killing creeps. Base Lifesteal: 30. Hero Max Health as Lifesteal: 1.5%. Deny Factor: 1. Enemy Hero Death Heal Radius: 300. Ally Kill Heal Factor: 0.5. Creep Lifesteal Factor: 0.6.

abilities.name: Bloodrage
abilities.description: Causes the affected unit to attack faster and deal more spell damage at the cost of a percentage of its health per second. Deals pure damage for a percentage of the attacked target's max health. Cast Range: 800. Max Health as Self-Damage per Second: 1.2% (0.5%). Attack Speed Bonus: 27/40/52/65 (57/70/82/95). Spell Damage Amp: 15%/20%/25%/30%. Duration: 8. Self Attack Speed Bonus: 55/80/105/130 (85/110/135/160). Cooldown: 14/12/10/8.

abilities.name: Blood Rite
abilities.description: The ritual completes after a delay, applying silence while damaging any enemy units within the radius. Cast Range: 1500. Radius: 600. Damage: 100/155/210/265 (200/255/310/365). Silence Duration: 3/4/5/6 (6/7/8/9). Cooldown: 15/14/13/12. Mana Cost: 90/100/110/120.

abilities.name: Thirst
abilities.description: Sensing blood of the mortally wounded, Bloodseeker gains bonus movement speed when an enemy hero's health falls below a certain threshold, with the bonuses increasing as their health falls further. These insatiable bonuses stack per hero. Effect Radius: Global. Enemy Max Health for Min Bonus: 99%. Enemy Max Health for Max Bonus: 25%. Max Move Speed Bonus per Enemy: 16%/24%/32%/40% (34%/42%/50%/58%). Speed Linger Duration: 4. Detection Radius: Global Visibility.

abilities.name: Rupture
abilities.description: Deals an initial damage based on the unit-targeted enemy's current health. If the unit moves, it additionally takes damage based on the distance moved. Replaces the ability's cooldown with charges. Increases initial damage. Cast Range: 800 (1200). Current Health as First Damage: 10% (13%). Moved Distance to Damage Factor: 0.35/0.45/0.55. Distance Threshold: 1300. Duration: 9/10/11. Cooldown: 75/70/65 (0.25). Mana Cost: 100/150/200.
